title: Calluw #5543
definition:
Sallu or Salu or Sallai = "weighed"

 1) a priest in the time of Zerubbabel
 2) father of Zimri, the prince of the Simeonites, who was slain by
    Phinehas
 3) a post exilic Benjamite
nasbUsage:
